_note: Update this file after each quarterly grinding release

_sources.CAA: Cocoa Association of Asia press releases

ECA.note: Lowest Q1 in 17 years. Bigger decline than consensus (-6%). Germany Q1 down 8.7% to 90,852t.

NCA.note: North America Q1 2026 down 3.8% YoY, adds to bearish demand signal

CAA.note: Asia Q1 2026 surprise beat: +5.2% YoY vs expectations of -6.7%. Regional divergence widening.

trend_summary: Q1 2026 grinding data confirms deepening regional divergence. Europe -7.8% YoY (lowest Q1 in 17 years), North America -3.8%. Asia surprised to the upside at +5.2% vs consensus -6.7%. Western demand destruction continues despite lower prices from 2024-25 highs. Asia providing partial offset — structurally stronger processing demand.

icco_balance.source: ICCO Mar 2026 update (revised up from +49,000t in Nov 2025)
icco_balance.note: StoneX forecasts 287,000t surplus for 2025/26 and 267,000t for 2026/27
